title: Cant trust this app
body: After registration you have to pay. Hidden paywall everywhere. The free trial was not free, got charged the day after I signed up and they refused to refund.

title: Crashes constantly
body: App crashes every single time I try to open a video activity. Reinstalled twice. Lost all my baby's milestone log after the last update. Useless.

title: Repetitive content
body: Same five activities recycled month after month. For $80 a kit I expected actual research-backed depth. Content feels like blog posts dressed up.

title: Logging takes forever
body: Used to love this app but now every action takes 4 taps and a popup. Why do I need to confirm a nap log three times? Logging a feed used to be one tap.

title: Needs multi-caregiver sync
body: Great until you realize my husband cant see what I logged on his phone. Multi-caregiver should be table stakes for a baby tracker in 2026.

title: Demasiado caro
body: Pague la suscripcion anual y me siguen mostrando anuncios de planes mas caros. Notificaciones cada 2 horas para que pague mas. Insoportable.

title: Pseudoscience
body: The 'mental leaps' concept has been debunked by multiple peer-reviewed studies. The app cites no real research and contradicts what our pediatrician told us. Disappointing.

title: Privacy nightmare
body: Why does a pregnancy app need my contacts and location 24/7? Sold my email to baby brands within a week. Deleted immediately. There is no way to actually delete your account either.

title: Traducao horrivel
body: A traducao para portugues e robotica e cheia de erros. Parece que usaram tradutor automatico. Os artigos tambem sao todos baseados em padroes americanos que nao fazem sentido aqui.

title: Refused to honor my points
body: Scanned 60 packs of diapers and the app lost half my points. Emailed support 4 times in 3 weeks, only got bot responses. No human will help. Done with this brand.

title: Faltan funciones
body: Esta bueno como guia general pero no tiene modo offline y no se pueden agregar varios hijos. Una pena porque la informacion es buena.

title: App killed the monitor
body: Hardware works fine. The new version of the app deleted my baby's sleep history and now wont reconnect to the sock. They forced an update that broke everything.

title: Aggressive ads in a paid app
body: I pay for premium and still get full-screen popups every 3 minutes pushing the 'family bundle'. A 2 year old should not be hammered with upsells.

title: Contenido en ingles solamente
body: La interfaz dice que esta en espanol pero la mayoria de los videos y juegos son en ingles. Mi hijo no entiende y se aburre.

title: Ad-infested
body: Every screen has 3 ads. The articles are 80% sponsored content from formula companies. Hard to find actual unbiased info. Switched to my OB's newsletter.

title: Cancelled the bassinet
body: Sent the SNOO back. The app required wifi to even turn it on. When wifi dropped at 3am the bassinet stopped working with a screaming newborn. Insane design choice.

title: No funciona en mi pais
body: La app aparece en Play Store de Colombia pero al abrir dice 'rewards solo disponible en Estados Unidos'. Bajenla del store si no funciona aqui.

title: Atividades muito basicas
body: Para o valor mensal eu esperava muito mais. As atividades sugeridas sao coisas que qualquer mae ja sabe fazer. Quero conteudo baseado em pesquisa nao senso comum.

title: Charged after canceling
body: I cancelled the play kit subscription in writing TWICE. They charged me for two more shipments. Customer service ghosts you after the first reply.

title: No vale el precio
body: Pague tres meses y son los mismos ejercicios cada semana con otro nombre. La verdad no vale ni una decima parte de lo que cobran.

title: Anuncios em todo lugar
body: Cada vez que abro o app tem um popup. Quero ler o conteudo sem ter que fechar 5 propagandas de formula infantil primeiro.

title: No me deja eliminar mi cuenta
body: Quise borrar mi cuenta despues de dejar de usar la app y no hay opcion en ninguna parte. Mande correo y nadie responde. Mis datos siguen ahi.

title: Subscription paywalls everything
body: Bought a $300 camera and now half the features are behind a $10/month subscription. Sleep insights paywalled. Sound detection paywalled. Bait and switch.

title: App fica travando
body: Toda vez que abro a tela de leap o app trava e tenho que reabrir. Acontece no meu Pixel 7 e no iPhone do meu marido. Resolvam isso.

title: Mucho ingles no aprenden espanol
body: Compre la version premium porque mi hijo necesita reforzar el espanol pero la mayoria del contenido educativo viene en ingles. No es lo que prometen.

title: Sold my data
body: Within 2 weeks of installing I started getting ads for ovulation tests and formula on every site. Coincidence? They share data with 'partners' you cant opt out of.

title: Confusing navigation
body: Why is the daily activity buried 4 taps deep? My 3 year old cant find anything on her own. Worse since the redesign.

title: Codigos no se canjean
body: Escaneo 20 paquetes y se atoran sin canjearse. Cuando contacto a soporte solo responde un bot que me da los mismos pasos que ya hice. Frustrante.

title: Generic content
body: Every article reads like it was written for everyone at once. 'Your 4-month-old might be doing X or might not.' Useless. I want personalized signal not a generic blog.

title: No way to talk to a human
body: Submitted the wrong birthday and now my points are stuck in the wrong age bracket. Their chat is bot-only and email goes to a no-reply. Hours wasted.

title: Conteudo muito americano
body: O conteudo nao tem nada brasileiro. Sugerem livros e atividades que nao existem aqui. Brincadeiras com referencias culturais que minha filha nao entende.

title: Lost months of sleep data
body: After the v4 update my entire sleep history is gone. 9 months of careful logging vanished. Support says 'we can't recover it'. Why ship an update that wipes data?

title: No es ciencia
body: Las predicciones de ovulacion contradicen lo que mi ginecologa me dijo y no citan ninguna fuente medica. Peligroso vender esto como confiable.

title: Wont let me cancel
body: Trial converted to paid without notice. Cancel button literally doesnt do anything. Had to dispute the charge with my credit card to get out. Predatory.

title: Just an ad funnel
body: My toddler taps any tile and it opens a popup to buy something. Even paid tier has 'recommended' content that's basically merchandise ads. Garbage for kids.

title: Cluttered UI
body: Used to be simple. Now there are stories, journals, milestones, prints, books, all jammed into one cluttered home screen. I just want to share a photo with grandma.

title: App barely works
body: The thermometer app crashes in the middle of taking a reading at least half the time. The whole point is to track during a fever and I cant. Useless premium feature.

title: Falta privacidade
body: Tem que dar acesso a quase tudo do telefone para usar a app. Para uma app de saude infantil isso e ridiculo. Onde estao meus dados?

title: No source citations
body: Health claims everywhere with zero links to studies. My doctor told me three of the recommendations were outdated. Edit your content or hire a real medical advisor.

title: Customer service is gone
body: Used to get answers within a day. Now its bot only. Asked a real question about a recall and got the same canned response 4 times. They dont care anymore.

title: No funciona offline
body: Vivo en un pueblo con internet inestable y la app no me deja registrar nada cuando no hay senal. Una app de tracking deberia funcionar sin internet.

title: Im moving on
body: My twins are 4 now and Lovevery has nothing useful past toddler stage. Why is there no continuation? Spent thousands on kits and now im starting from scratch. Sad.

title: Refund refused
body: Cancelled during the trial within 24 hours and they still charged me the annual. 3 weeks of emails and nothing. Disputing with my bank now.

title: Tudo em ingles
body: O app aparece em portugues mas as atividades sao quase todas em ingles. Meu filho de 4 anos nao acompanha. Para um app educacional isso e basico.

title: Doom and gloom
body: Every article is about what can go wrong with your pregnancy. I get anxious just opening the app. Where is the supportive normal content?

title: Always errors
body: Receipt scanner fails on 8 out of 10 receipts. Submit-manual takes 5+ minutes per receipt. Reward redemption page errors out. Whole app is broken.

title: Constant alerts
body: App buzzes me 12+ times a night for normal baby movement. Cannot tune sensitivity to anything useful. I am more sleep deprived from the app than I was without it.

title: Falta personalizacion
body: La info es generica. Pregunte sobre un caso especifico de mi bebe y la app solo me dio articulos generales. Esperaba mas para una app premium.

title: Cant skip onboarding
body: Cant get past the welcome screens without granting every permission. Tried 'maybe later' and it loops back to the same screens. Forced consent isnt consent.

title: Update broke everything
body: The forced v8 update wiped my settings and my custom schedules. Now the SNOO wont respond to its own buttons until I restart the app every time.
